B06E309048F25CC6D06384B786851C58: "When you say chum, fish say yum!" <whisper>I'm, uh, still working on the tagline.</>
FD04E84543CEC90C032909BE8E3195E2: <whisper>Hmm. Now that I'm hearing it aloud, probably that second thing.</>
F9C695F04120E4879648ACB10EB3ECC0: A weirdly specific wish, but I guess everyone got what they wanted! <whisper>Kind of.</>
85A014C3483C880D90C40D8D9C984B98: A {Tier} Battle with The Thing From Beneath requires {ResourceCount} {ResourceName}
DE5050AC44067AB018340BBD88D77123: And no naming yours "The Pelican"! That's already what I call mine!
FC856B24469AD8AAF45DADB36412F9C9: Bold and brash with a 'stache to match!
392475AD4BC90108F62B549C30FF9768: Can't get enough of my bait, eh? Well, I'm fresh out! Come back tomorrow and I'll sell you some more sumptuous slurry.
B1BFA0424E6822839EE219A5CEBCE0DF: Can’t get enough of my bait, eh? Well, I’m fresh out! Come back tomorrow and I’ll sell you some more sumptuous slurry.
83C748F64E8C775E4B4BF093F0F07689: Could I buy some special bait, please?
B7B38DBA401DA9B61AE03AA87C1CE018: Could I buy some special bait, please?
C31080E54A6EB27D8EAE97A4E410BF04: Did you say I can fish for Airship Parts?
7671674E44509ACDDB5A078659156C98: Found in Daily chests and can be found in Chests out in the world
E4F67C444D9A62D07697C2AF02CAE6EA: Gather 'round, stranger, and hear the tawdry tale of an unspeakable beast that lurked beneath the <Emphasis>Misty Isle</>!
B491EEBD4628ED1A53E942AC5CF4FD8C: He once said, "If this ship ever goes down, I hope it's into the gaping maw of a slithering, slathering beast that shoots lasers out of its face."
6ABCCAFE41910271FB0CE1979A817675: Hey There - Got any Bamboo for me, got a bait bucket here for ya!
5207637E4E5A9192205E759AA9555813: I don't just sleep with one under my pillow, I sleep with one AS a pillow!
3CDD010D49FE852059A627815ED24F93: I don't know what's worse! Not being taken seriously, or losing all of my crew to a nightmare creature that exists beyond all comprehension!
547DB2B84ACA977DEE3437B3490B423F: I swear, you yoink <b>one little sword</> from a Ninja and you never hear the end of it.
35F0F30B417700470B3FF78A7D6A14BF: If you see him, you can tell him I'm keeping it. Light as a pelican, sturdy as another pelican, and sharper than a really, really sharp third pelican!
073214CB4464374E161FCA90F152CE41: If you want to throw an extra spicy pepper in the pot, you can also <keybind>Target</>parry and counter your enemies just before their attacks land!
9D1B47334A4B86E39D7C5EB357A6EF66: It had claws like razorblades! Tentacles like evil pool noodles! A face like... um... I guess like a sort of floppy... flower lookin' thing?
9E1E5EEB4502A602AC80CEAF392CC7FC: It once ate some poor, handsome Airship Captain's entire fleet. And that captain... <shout>was ME!</>
EE61F9FE4002D919052457A000710AED: It stinks! It stinks so bad!
BB162A0F49E5F114C6B6E3B7B9FE448D: It was tentacle-y, laser-y, and ravenous to eat up all the <Emphasis>Unknowable Energy</> we were hauling!
339AF8064AD95BD690FA31BA3DA6D5F5: It's very dangerous! I don't recommend doing that!
B93677224750A9A588E006B3A5747E50: Jumpin' jeepers, you scared me rotten! I've been on edge ever since my fleet was attacked off the coast by that... <Emphasis>Thing!</>
819A51C040AB54CEAB50E7930B9CC73B: Katanas are great for chaining together precise <keybind touch_tag="MobileHUD.Button.Juno.MainHand">Fire</> strikes, getting up in your enemy's face with dash attacks, and unleashing terror from above with group-shattering jump attacks!
9684C7C54A36DAA7E483289F434CFB92: Look at that! Despite every warning to the contrary, you won all pieces to build a <Emphasis>Raid Zeppelin!</>
E9F3A58B430F5358C351DB84756AFAA9: Now if you'll excuse me, I've got a couple more days of screaming to get back to.
822704994D3928624900EF9237B60270: Sorry, I'm still a tiny bit locked in the tentacled grip of existential terror!
E6AEC5A94FCC8136E59C5B9276D58129: Summon The Thing From Beneath for a {Tier} Battle?
4726879549B616E9AAC605892935D1CA: Sure, maybe you could <b>fight that thing</> to win <Emphasis>Airship Part Tomes</>. Me? I'd just use <b>my special bait</> to fish for them off the Misty Island shore.
B85FA7284457D157FE212FA189EB3D26: Tell you what, I'm trying to rebuild an airship of my own... I'll happily trade you a bundle of <Emphasis>Bamboo</> for some of my special <Emphasis>Flintlocke's Bait Bucket</>!  Just let me know if you ever want to trade.
5C8372FD479DFD20BD94959C032550CE: That <Emphasis>Thing From Beneath</> is a messy eater, so <Emphasis>Airship Parts</> aplenty dropped into the nearby waters when my fleet got chomped up.
2D96B9954E2C621C605C0FBBE859C172: That's fine, more for me! Come back if you change your mind.
B5CADAE74F120105D565608E1E476D49: That's fine, more for me! Come back if you change your mind.
8EF4E3BE4BEA04CB994399A44FBDBDCC: That's right, I've got a pungent sludge you can use in the water near the <Emphasis>Misty Isle</> to fish for <Emphasis>Airship Parts</>! It could be all yours in exchange for a little <emphasis>Bamboo</>!
56509B2240CD9D562E747EB7390E97F2: The Thing From Beneath has Awakened!
5F5A219C4D08A2008624DFB22AAFCBDD: The Thing From Beneath has abandoned this place. Perhaps it shall return one day... Will you be ready?
4DD14AAF4152DD371E8C8E8731F9A8B3: The Thing From Beneath is recovering, return in 1 minute
3AEA0893459A14227B7930AFC1B279FB: The Thing From Beneath is recovering, return in {hours} hour
073A6F16482A44B2EEA80A8FF2C1D2AB: The Thing From Beneath is recovering, return in {hours} hours
995941D94FF79F373D8E66919C07AAB9: The Thing From Beneath is recovering, return in {minutes} minutes
3C6CCE594E3578F8F1398CA40EB7C452: The last fella who captained that ship was one of the bravest men I knew.
1C4EE60D41CFCBB49754EDAD6C32DC3C: They say that one day, <emphasis>The Thing From Beneath</> might return with its belly full of <emphasis>Airship Parts</>. Will you be ready?
5CF1429F45E4A8B17CD85D9F2F712503: Things might be a different story if you had a big ol' stinkin' bucket of <b>Captain Flintlocke's Patented Real Deal Fish Bait.</>
980760E345374E963A5B5BBD651F75D6: This will destroy the blueprint from the world
91DADBA74EEE4F59F907149D3639ECEC: What do you know about Katanas?
D1D6C9B346E93D1D832C13B06F566BB8: What's that? You didn't heed my warning at all and went to the Misty Isle to defeat <Emphasis>The Thing From Beneath</> and win <Emphasis>Airship Part Tomes</>?
EEC453C34A494D50DF1AB2AA44052F9E: Whatever you do, don't even think about heading to the <Emphasis>Misty Isle</> off the coast! And <b>definitely</> don't take <Emphasis>Unknowable Energy</> with you!
95695FD24E78BEABFD7906AA31EECAD0: Why are you asking me about <Emphasis>Katanas</>?! Did <Emphasis>Kai</> put you up to this?
735277D14D1CA269836B25B26B8B9E14: You could try fishing them out of the water with a normal Bait Bucket, but your chances would be slimmer than the stalks of a Stilt-Legged Water Warbler.
B4D478424096FCD7607597B5E6471271: You should probably Learn it in the <Emphasis>Mastery Tab</> so you could craft one of your own at a <Emphasis>Ninja Workbench</>.
F1EBF2614F73ED0BB58099AC22C5A1B0: You'll need something to put that fish bait in.
